hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: Your data belongs to you. Here's, in plain terms, what we do — and don't do — with it.

collect.title: The data we collect
items: Account information: first name, last name, email and/or phone number, city, profile photo.
Your listing content: title, description, photos, price, category.
Your conversations in the internal messaging system, to keep track between buyers and sellers.
Your security question answers, if you set them up (to help recover your account).
Technical browsing data: pages visited, anonymized visit statistics.

why.title: Why we use it
items: To create and secure your account.
To display your listings and connect you with other users.
To power messaging between buyers and sellers.
To send you useful notifications (email, in-app).
To improve TrouveTout224 over time.

protection.title: How it's protected
items: Your passwords and security question answers are encrypted (hashed) and never stored or readable in plain text — not even by our team.
All communication with the site goes through a secure connection (HTTPS).
Access to your data is strictly limited to what's technically needed for the service.

sharing.title: Who it's shared with
items: With no one. We never sell or share your data for advertising purposes.
Only technical providers essential to running the site have access, each only for what concerns them.

partners.google: secure sign-in if you choose "Sign in with Google"

cookies.title: Cookies and audience measurement
items: Technical cookies keep your session logged in — essential to the site working.
When enabled, Google Analytics may collect anonymized traffic statistics, to help us improve the site.
You can disable non-essential cookies in your browser settings at any time.

rights.title: Your rights
items: Access your data from your profile and settings at any time.
Edit your information (name, photo, city, password...) directly in Settings.
Delete your account and data whenever you wish.
Contact us for any specific request (data export, question about your account).

contact.title: A question about your data?
contact.subtitle: Write to us, we respond quickly.
